Meta.Title: 3 Day Business Trip in San Diego
Meta.Summary: A prebuilt 3-day San Diego sample itinerary for demo seeding.

Tasks.Task: Flight lands at San Diego International Airport. Morning arrival to get the business trip started.
Travel method: Flight. Expected cost: Included.
Highlights: Morning arrival, Baggage claim.
Afternoon strategy and project alignment meeting at the downtown office.
Travel method: Taxi. Expected cost: Work.
Highlights: Business presentation, Downtown San Diego.
Upscale steak and seafood dinner in the Gaslamp Quarter. Great atmosphere to unwind after travel and meetings.
Travel method: Walk. Expected cost: USD 80-120.
Highlights: Gaslamp Quarter dining, Steakhouse.
Catch a late movie to relax for the evening in the downtown area.
Travel method: Walk. Expected cost: USD 20.
Highlights: Evening entertainment, Movie theater.
Popular local breakfast spot known for creative pancakes and morning classics. Casual and energetic.
Travel method: Walk. Expected cost: USD 25-35.
Highlights: Local favorite, Hearty breakfast.
Trip to the Fashion Valley outdoor mall to get fitted for and purchase a new professional suit.
Travel method: Taxi. Expected cost: Variable.
Highlights: Outdoor mall, Apparel shopping.
Afternoon downtime with a few games at an upbeat downtown bowling alley.
Travel method: Walk. Expected cost: USD 40.
Highlights: Casual recreation, Bowling.
Relaxing stroll along the San Diego Bay waterfront with views of the USS Midway and Coronado Bridge.
Travel method: Walk. Expected cost: Free.
Highlights: Ocean breeze, Bay views, Relaxing atmosphere.
Quick artisanal coffee and breakfast sandwich before the final meeting.
Travel method: Walk. Expected cost: USD 15.
Highlights: Quick service, Artisanal coffee.
Final morning meeting to secure next steps and project deliverables before flying out.
Travel method: Walk. Expected cost: Work.
Highlights: Business closing, Work meeting.
Award-winning artisanal tacos for a fast but memorable San Diego lunch before heading to the airport.
Travel method: Walk. Expected cost: USD 30-45.
Highlights: Authentic tacos, Quick lunch.
Flight departure from San Diego International Airport. End of trip.
Travel method: Flight. Expected cost: Included.
Highlights: Departure flight, End of trip.
